name: image-issue-analyzer
description: Paperclip plugin that analyzes issue and comment images and posts a text summary.

interface.shortDescription: Analyzes embedded issue images and comments on them.
interface.longDescription: When an issue or comment contains a Markdown image embed, this plugin resolves the asset, stages it in a temporary file, runs Kimi on the image, and writes the result back as a text comment.
defaultPrompt: Analyze attached issue screenshots and summarize UI problems.
